# Code generated by e2e-generator. DO NOT EDIT.

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.20)
project(e2e_tests C)

set(CMAKE_C_STANDARD 11)

# Find ts_pack_ffi
set(FFI_DIR "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../../crates/ts-pack-ffi")
set(FFI_INCLUDE "${FFI_DIR}/include")
set(FFI_LIB_DIR "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../../target/release")

include_directories(${FFI_INCLUDE})
link_directories(${FFI_LIB_DIR})

enable_testing()

target_link_libraries(test_error_empty_language_name ts_pack_ffi)
add_test(NAME test_error_empty_language_name COMMAND test_error_empty_language_name)
